task_objective: Standardize template naming and implement standalone YData-like theme
design_decisions: Renamed 'spa.html' to 'default.html' to clarify its role as the primary theme.
Converted 'ydata-like.html' from a React component file to a standalone HTML template to match the library's distribution model.
Updated 'Report.to_html' to dynamically load templates based on a theme name, enabling future theme extensibility.
Improved screenshot utility robustness by waiting for the React root element to be populated rather than theme-specific text.
results: All tests passed. Users can now choose between themes using the 'theme' parameter in to_html/to_file.
